comment: Bundle baseline. Updated 2026-05-11 after adding MCP-UI support. Net delta vs prior baseline (2,574,610 B): +31,556 B. Adds hand-rolled MCP-UI integration: src/mcp/mcpUiTypes.ts (resource extractor), src/mcp/mcpUiActions.ts (tool|prompt|link|notify action router with URL scheme allowlist), src/ui/chat/blocks/MCPUIBlockView.tsx (sandboxed iframe with theme bridge + postMessage protocol), src/ui/chat/hooks/useObsidianThemeVars.ts (Obsidian CSS-var snapshot), src/ui/chat/mcpUiContext.ts (deps context); plus type-system extension McpUiContent across chat/types, conversationSchema, contextBridge, graph buildToolResultContent. No new prod dependency. Cap reset to 30 KB for incremental tuning on top.
